name: Antero Midstream Corp
business: We are a growth-oriented midstream energy company formed to own, operate and develop midstream energy assets to primarily service Antero Resources production and completion activity.
sellsTo: Other operators in the Appalachian Basin

exposures.sentence: Our assets consist of gathering pipelines, compressor stations and interests in processing and fractionation plants that collect and process production from the Appalachian Basin in West Virginia and Ohio.

catalysts.event: Utica Shale Divestiture expected to close
catalysts.sentence: The Utica Shale Divestiture is expected to close in February 2026, subject to the satisfaction of certain customary closing conditions.
On February 11, 2026, we announced a 2026 capital budget with a range of $190 million to $220 million.
